global_description: A small, plump bird with a rounded body and a distinctive black hood covering the head and throat. The rest of the plumage is a mix of brown, gray, and white, with a streaked pattern on the back and wings. The beak is short and conical.
discriminative_attributes: Black hood covering head and throat

part_details.head: Covered in a solid black hood extending to the throat.
part_details.back: Brown with gray streaks, blending into the wings.
part_details.wings: Brown and gray with streaked pattern, blending into the back.
part_details.underparts: White, contrasting with the darker upper body.
part_details.beak: Short, conical, suitable for seed eating.

spatial_relations: The black hood covers the head and extends to the throat.
The streaked wings are positioned on either side of the body.
The white underparts are located below the streaked back.
